title: Business Rates and Investment: Call for Evidence
body: "Transforming the business rates system is a multi-year process. Following the Transforming Business Rates Interim Report, the government committed to explore how moving to a marginal tax rate, where successive bands are taxed at increasing rates, may be beneficial for investment. This Call for Evidence seeks stakeholder input on these elements of the system, as well as the overall role business rates plays in investment. In addition, a number of ratepayers with large capital expenditure have raised concerns the impact the receipts and expenditure (R&E) methodology has on investment decisions. The Call for Evidence seeks stakeholder input on these and options to address them. "
